claims.text: CRAFT hand is a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance.
claims.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

claims.text: CRAFT hand places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid.
claims.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid, and uses rollingcontact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.

claims.text: CRAFT hand uses rolling-contact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.
claims.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid, and uses rollingcontact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.

claims.text: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the CRAFT hand through tendons.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

claims.text: CRAFT hand improves strength and endurance in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT hand maintains comparable repeatability in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT hand improves handling of fragile and low-friction items in teleoperation.
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items, and the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.

claims.text: CRAFT hand covers 33 out of 33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items, and the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.

claims.text: The full design of CRAFT hand costs under $600.
claims.source_quote: The full design costs under $600 and will be released open-source with visionbased teleoperation and simulation integration.
